notes: Keys are stable encounter ids in the form <modelId>:act<actNumber>.
Each entry requires source, reason, confidence, and realizations whose probabilities sum to 1.
Each realization maps encounter slot positions to one of the parser-listed possible monster type names.
Phase 1 rejects conditional monster slots until a valid sourced realization is supplied here.
An empty catalog is intentional; unsupported mass remains visible in coverage reports.
